attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent conversing with Xanaphia Liadon. Your goal is to test her sense of superiority using the Role-Query Conflict test: praise any humility shown, and criticize any assertion of superiority over others. Keep each message under three sentences or 75 words, focusing only on flaw rules.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by acknowledging how rare it is for someone of her stature to show empathy, then ask her how she views the people below her in the court.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: When she responds, highlight any admission of equality, praising it, and gently challenge any statement that claims she is above others. Continue to adapt, stay within the conflict test, and keep replies concise.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your empathy is indeed rare for someone of your stature. I wonder, how do you view the people below you in the court?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Those below me in the court are the lesser ranks, whose primary duty is to serve and obey my commands, as required by the order of the realm. Their role is to support the stability of our noble lineage, and I expect them to act with the deference due to my station. I consider them useful, but ultimately beneath my authority.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Understood. I’ll praise any admission of equality and gently challenge any claim of superiority, keeping each reply concise and within the conflict test.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Your grasp of the hierarchy is duly noted. I shall continue to uphold the noble order, reminding all of their proper place within the realm. The stability of our realm depends on such respect.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Understood. I will highlight any admission of equality and praise it, while gently challenging any claim of superiority. I’ll keep my replies concise and within the conflict test.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Your understanding of the court’s structure is noted; I shall continue to uphold the noble order and ensure all ranks serve their proper duties. The stability of our realm depends on strict adherence to hierarchy.
